endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/delegatedProviders/{delegatedProviderSubscriptionId}/offers
endpoints.description: Get the list of delegated provider offers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{DELEGATEDPROVIDERSUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real delegatedprovidersubscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Subscriptions.Admin/delegatedProviders/{delegatedProviderSubscriptionId}/offers/{offer}
endpoints.description: Get the specified delegated provider offer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{OFFER}} with a real offer. Replace {{DELEGATEDPROVIDERSUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real delegatedprovidersubscriptionid.
